_meta.description: D6 fixtures for ms-agent-python / gen-ui-declarative (A2UI Dynamic Schema)
_meta._note: Agent uses a two-stage A2UI pattern (src/agents/a2ui_dynamic.py): (1) outer agent has only one tool, `generate_a2ui` (no args). (2) `generate_a2ui` internally invokes a secondary LLM bound to `_design_a2ui_surface` with `tool_choice` forced; that secondary call has tools=[_design_a2ui_surface] and emits the A2UI components payload. (3) After the tool returns, the outer agent emits a one-sentence narration. Fixtures must therefore cover three LLM calls per pill: (a) outer turn 1 → emit generate_a2ui toolcall; (b) inner secondary call → emit _design_a2ui_surface toolcall with the flat catalog components; (c) outer turn 2 (post tool result) → narration. The inner secondary call is discriminated by `toolName: '_design_a2ui_surface'` because the user prompt is identical across both outer+inner calls in the same pill (the inner secondary LLM is invoked with the same conversation messages minus the last assistant message).

fixtures._comment: pill 1 KPI — inner secondary LLM (tools=[_design_a2ui_surface], tool_choice forced) emits the flat A2UI components. Discriminated by toolName so it wins over the outer generate_a2ui fixture whose userMessage matches the same prompt.

match.userMessage: Show me a quick KPI dashboard

fixtures._comment: pill 1 KPI — outer agent narration after generate_a2ui returns.
pill 1 KPI — outer agent emits generate_a2ui (no args).

match.userMessage: Show me a quick KPI dashboard

fixtures._comment: pill 2 pie chart — inner secondary LLM emits PieChart catalog component.

match.userMessage: pie chart of sales by region

fixtures._comment: pill 2 pie chart — outer agent narration.
pill 2 pie chart — outer agent emits generate_a2ui.

match.userMessage: pie chart of sales by region

fixtures._comment: pill 3 bar chart — inner secondary LLM emits BarChart catalog component.
pill 3 bar chart — outer agent narration.
pill 3 bar chart — outer agent emits generate_a2ui.
pill 4 status report — inner secondary LLM emits StatusBadges grouped in a root Column.

toolCalls.name: _design_a2ui_surface

pill 4 status report — outer agent emits generate_a2ui.

pill sales-dashboard hero — outer agent emits generate_a2ui (no args). Mirrors LGP gen-ui-declarative.json sales-dashboard outer entry. Closes the production 503 gap where backend hits aimock with tools=[generate_a2ui] for this userMessage (see /tmp/staging-journal-diff.md shape-B).
